response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified the performance of 'Rokuchou Nen to Ichiya Monogatari' (00:00 - 03:12). Metadata identified from on-screen text. Performed by Kazama Iroha. Original artist: kemu. Search query: '六兆年と一夜物語 kemu lyrics'.
2. Identified a short transitional segment (03:12 - 03:28) where other performers join.
3. Identified the performance of 'Star-mine' (03:28 - 05:01). Metadata identified from on-screen text. Performed by Kazama Iroha, Sakura Miko, Usada Pekora. Original artist: Jin. Search query: 'Star-mine じん lyrics'.
4. Compiled the information into the requested JSON format, ensuring full lyrics were included and timestamps were correct.
response.global_summary: The video features a vocal performance by Kazama Iroha, who sings 'Rokuchou Nen to Ichiya Monogatari' (六兆年と一夜物語) originally by kemu. Following a brief transitional segment where other performers join, Kazama Iroha, Sakura Miko, and Usada Pekora perform the song 'Star-mine' originally by Jin.

scenes.description: Kazama Iroha performs 'Rokuchou Nen to Ichiya Monogatari' (六兆年と一夜物語) on stage with dynamic lighting and camera movements. The song title is displayed as an overlay.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
In a nameless village in a nameless era
There lived a nameless, young boy
It was a fairy tale that no one knew

From the moment he was born
He was labeled an unwanted child, an oni's child
And he received punishment far beyond what he could bear

There's nothing sad about it, though
Hand in hand, at sunset, we walk

I don't know, I don't know
I don't know anything
Neither the kindness after being scolded
Nor the warmth of a hand after the rain
But, the truth is, the truth is, the truth is
It's really cold, isn't it?

I won't die, I won't die
Why won't I die?
Even though I can't even dream a single dream

The fairy tale that no one knew
Was sucked into the sunset and disappeared

With violence that feels like it's being vomited out
And days of scornful glares
You stood there before I knew it
Even though you shouldn't speak to me
'I want to know your name'
I'm sorry, I don't have a name, nor a tongue either

Even though I have nowhere to belong
'Let's go home together'
Hand in hand, we walk

I don't know, I don't know
I don't know anything
Not about you not being a child anymore
Nor the warmth of a stranger's hand, to which I'm not accustomed
It's just truly, truly, truly, truly cold, isn't it?
I won't die, I won't die
Why won't I die?
Even though I'm just a fairy tale that no one knows

I was sucked into the sunset and disappeared

With violence that feels like it's being vomited out
And days of scornful glares
You stood there before I knew it
Even though you shouldn't speak to me
'I want to know your name'
I'm sorry, I don't have a name, nor a tongue either

'I want to go home together'
Hand in hand, we walk

Not about you not being a child anymore

I won't die, I won't die
Why won't I die?
Even though I'm just a fairy tale that no one knows

I was sucked into the sunset and disappeared

Hand in hand, we walk

It's just truly, truly, truly, truly cold, isn't it?
I won't die, I won't die
Why won't I die?
Even though I'm just a fairy tale that no one knows

I was sucked into the sunset and disappeared

It's just truly, truly, truly, truly cold, isn't it?
I won't die, I won't die
Why won't I die?
Even though I'm just a fairy tale that no one knows

I was sucked into the sunset and disappeared

I will not quit, I will not quit
Why won't you quit?
Some day you'll be killed
Even though I don't know anything
In the sunset, you will hear a faint voice
And in the story, you'll be sucked in and disappear

Sun goes down, night rises
I'm tired of playing, I'm caught
In a world like this, if you and I
Could just disappear
If everyone could just disappear
If everyone could just disappear

I don't know, I don't know
I hear a voice that I don't know
And you and I, the rest of humanity
Are about to fight back
Hand in hand, we walk

I don't know, I don't know
I don't know anything
Not about you not being a child anymore
Nor the warmth of a stranger's hand, to which I'm not accustomed
It's just truly, truly, truly, truly cold, isn't it?
I won't die, I won't die
Why won't I die?
From now on, I don't know your name, either

For now, for now
This is fine
It's just truly, truly, truly, truly cold, isn't it?
I don't know, I don't know
That ringing in my ears is
Sucked into the sunset and disappeared.",reference_lyrics_og:

scenes.description: A short transitional instrumental segment where the music pauses briefly and other performers join Kazama Iroha on stage.
Kazama Iroha, Sakura Miko, and Usada Pekora perform 'Star-mine' on stage. The song title is displayed as an overlay.
scenes.performer_in_video: Kazama Iroha, Sakura Miko, Usada Pekora
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
風を置いて 雨を抜けて 咲き誇れ
あぁ、夜風に揺られている
折れないように怯えている
ずっと雨に濡らされている
またどうしたって凍えてしまったんだ
誰かこの声に応答して
痛がるばっかで咲けないままのハートを
あぁ、今
見逃せないくらい綺麗に
咲かせたいんだ

光っていた未来が
ずっと待っていた世界が
きらめく音の中にあるなら
最低で最悪な涙も
痛がりで嫌いな声も
連れていきたいんだ全部
不完全な毎日が
一瞬のカケラたちが
重なってこんな歌を奏でたら
それは
言葉だけじゃ届かない距離を
きっと飛び越えて結ぶ
きっと輪を描いていく

さぁ涙を拭いて
喉を鳴らして
心臓がペースアップしていく
怖がらないでノッてけ
飛んで浮いて
ベロを回して
グルーヴとランデヴしていく
こんがらがっちゃつまんないもんね
迷ったら踊れ
時代はセンセーショナル
御構い無しのイナズマ
泣いて声を嗄らして
泥だらけになっても生きていたい
今夜あの空で合流して
朝が満たすまでそれぞれの星を探そう
ねぇ、今
同じことを思っていたんだって
ほら話さなくても分かり合えた
あぁ、あぁ！
こんな嬉しさを
ずっと歌ってみたかった！

光っていた未来が
ずっと待っていた世界が
きらめいて目の前にあるから
瞬きの刹那まで
この物語の最後まで
輝く花でいたいんだ
不完全な私たちが
一瞬のカケラたちが
重なってこんな歌を奏でたら
それは
夢見るだけじゃ叶わない想いを
ずっと新しくしていく
ずっと追いかけていこう

風を置いて 雨を抜けて 咲き誇れ
満天の空へ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Leave the wind, pass through the rain, bloom in full glory
Ah, being swayed by the night wind
Being afraid, trying not to break
Always being drenched by the rain
Once again, I've ended up freezing
Someone, please respond to this voice
A heart that just hurts and can't bloom
Ah, now, I want to make it bloom
So beautifully that you can't look away

If the future that was shining
And the world that was always waiting
Are within the sparkling sound
Then even the lowest, worst tears
And the voice that hurts and is hated
I want to take them all with me
The incomplete everyday life
And the moments that are fragments
If they overlap and play this kind of song
Then it will surely cross the distance
That words alone cannot reach
It will surely draw a circle

Now, wipe your tears, clear your throat
Your heart rate is speeding up
Don't be afraid, ride it, fly, float
Twist your tongue, rendezvous with the groove
If you get confused, it's boring, isn't it?
If you get lost, dance, the era is sensational
Lightning that doesn't care about anything
Cry, strain your voice, even if you get covered in mud
I want to live
Tonight, let's meet in that sky
And search for our respective stars until the morning fills us
Hey, now, to think we were thinking the same thing
Look, we understood each other without even speaking
Ah, ah! I've always wanted to try singing this joy!

If the future that was shining
And the world that was always waiting
Are there sparkling before my eyes
Then I want to be a flower that shines
Until the final moment of this story
The incomplete us
And the moments that are fragments
If they overlap and play this kind of song
Then it will surely make the thoughts
That cannot be fulfilled just by dreaming
Newer and newer
Let's keep chasing them

Leave the wind, pass through the rain, bloom in full glory
To the sky full of stars
